headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk — Governance controversies erode trust in private sector banks, raising cost of capital and regulatory scrutiny
what_matters: Triggered BRSR, GRI, COSO ERM, DJSI, ESRS, S&P Global ESG frameworks; risk of SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions.
Risk of P/E compression and margin erosion due to negative sentiment and possible exclusion from ESG indices.
Potential for higher cost of capital (+20-40bps), risk of ESG fund outflows, and possible bond spread widening.
